home.heroTitle: Nordivia Biopharmaceuticals — Science that raises the bar
home.heroSubtitle: Applied research, robust processes, and consistency-driven manufacturing—focused on traceability, quality, and continuous improvement.

trust.title: Quality and Transparency
trust.subtitle: Standardization, traceability, and documentation embedded into research and manufacturing routines.

home.aboutSubtitle: Applied-research mindset and processes designed for consistency, control, and scalability.

softCards.c1Body: Focus on validation, stability, and continuous improvement.
softCards.c4Body: Controls at critical stages to ensure standards.

home.sinceBody: Since 1980, Nordivia has developed applied research focused on peptides with a clear goal: maximize safety, consistency, and molecular performance. Our processes are supported by rigorous quality control, structured technical documentation, and robust operating protocols.
home.rndBody: Our Montreal research center is equipped with state-of-the-art technology and controlled environments, enabling advanced studies to improve peptide synthesis, stability, and applications with scientific precision.
home.automationBody: Nordivia operates automated production lines, ensuring standardization, traceability, and purity in peptide manufacturing, with continuous quality monitoring at every step.
home.scaleBody: Technology and validation routines to support growth without losing consistency and compliance.

midCta.title: Explore the full catalog
midCta.subtitle: Browse products and technical details quickly.

home.partnersBody: Nordivia maintains strategic partnerships with universities and research centers, fostering continuous scientific development, technological innovation, and operational excellence.
